name: Knowledge Worker
description: Person building a personal knowledge base

name: Data Ownership
description: Notes are plain files the user fully controls

name: Frictionless Knowledge Management
description: Capture and link ideas with minimal friction

name: Local-First and Plain-Text
description: Data lives on the device as markdown files

name: Offline Capability
description: The app MUST work fully without a network connection

name: Plugin Extensibility
description: Third parties extend the app via the public Plugin API

name: Personal Knowledge Management
description: The capability to capture link and retrieve knowledge

name: Note to Insight
description: Capture a note then link it then surface insight

name: Knowledge Worker Role
description: The human author using the app

name: Linking and Tagging
description: Creating wiki-links and tags between notes

name: Vault
description: A folder of notes forming a knowledge base

name: Vault API
description: Reads and writes vault files (obsidian-api Vault)

name: MetadataCache
description: Index of links tags and backlinks (obsidian-api)

name: Graph View
description: Interactive node-link view of the vault

name: Canvas
description: Infinite spatial canvas using JSON Canvas

name: Plugin System
description: Loads community and core plugins (Plugin API)

name: Local Filesystem
description: The device file system holding the vault

name: Electron Runtime
description: Chromium and Node runtime for the desktop app

name: CodeMirror Engine
description: The text editor engine inside the app
